message:
Running command: 
# Check what the process is doing via /proc
ORPID=956540
echo "=== /proc/wchan ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/wchan 2>/dev/null || echo "No wchan"

echo ""
echo "=== /proc/stat ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "utime:", $14, "stime:", $15}'

echo ""
echo "=== Maps (memory segments, first 20) ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/maps 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Thread list ==="
ls /proc/$ORPID/task/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
